transcription.text: Okay, which one? The alligator or the brand new fox from JCPenney? Gee, the alligator has that terrific color, but so does the fox. And fit, comfort, looks, easy care fabric, they're all the same. And colors, there's even a fox in raspberry. So, what's the difference? About $5 less. See you later, alligator.
